title: as soon as / the moment + S + V（一……就……）

formulas.formula: As soon as / The moment / Once + S + V, S + V
formulas.zh: 一……就……；強調兩個動作緊接發生，子句用現在式代未來

formulas.formula: No sooner + had + S + V + than + S + V（倒裝）
formulas.zh: 倒裝表達「剛……就……」，主句用過去完成式

explanation: 此句型用來表達兩個動作的緊接發生關係。時間副詞子句（as soon as / the moment / once）引導前置動作，主句表後續動作。重點是子句縱使指未來事件，仍用現在式，不用未來式。倒裝形式 no sooner...than、hardly...when 意義相同但語氣更強，使用過去完成式。易混淆之處在於忘記用現在式替代未來式，或混淆倒裝與非倒裝的時態搭配。

examples.eng: As soon as you arrive at the airport, call me immediately.
examples.chi: 你一到達機場，就立刻打電話給我。

examples.eng: The moment the teacher enters the classroom, all students stop talking.
examples.chi: 老師一進教室，所有學生就停止說話。

examples.eng: Once you finish your homework, you can play video games.
examples.chi: 你一完成功課，就可以玩電動。

examples.eng: No sooner had he heard the news than he rushed to the hospital.
examples.chi: 他剛聽到這個消息就趕往醫院。

extension.tip: 判斷時態時，記住：時間副詞子句縱使表未來，仍用現在式。倒裝形式 no sooner/hardly/scarcely 必搭過去完成式在主句，than/when 後用簡單過去式。若混淆時態會導致文法錯誤。

examples.test: ✗ As soon as you will arrive, I will pick you up.
examples.result: → ✓ As soon as you arrive, I will pick you up.（子句用現在式）

examples.test: ✗ No sooner did he leave than his boss called.
examples.result: → ✓ No sooner had he left than his boss called.（主句用過去完成式）

examples.test: ✓ The moment she enters, everyone applauds.
examples.result: → 現在式背景下的標準用法，表習慣性動作

extension.note: 時間副詞子句永遠現在式，倒裝形式主句用過去完成式——三個關鍵不能混。

exercises.sentence: As soon as the meeting ends, everyone left the room.
exercises.translation: 會議一結束，每個人都離開了房間。

parts: this form, submit it to the office.
exercises.sentence: The moment you complete this form, submit it to the office.
exercises.translation: 你一填完這個表格，就提交到辦公室。

parts: the news than she called her parents.
exercises.sentence: No sooner had she heard the news than she called her parents.
exercises.translation: 她剛聽到消息就打電話給父母。

parts: the exam, they can go home.
exercises.sentence: Once the students finish the exam, they can go home.
exercises.translation: 學生一完成考試，就可以回家。

vocab_table.zh: 一……就……（最常見，任何時態背景）
一……就……（強調時間點，較正式）
一旦；一……就……（帶有條件色彩）
幾乎沒有……就……（倒裝，書面語）

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選填正確的時態，表示一到達就立即打電話
mc_exercises.question_eng: As soon as you _______ at the airport, call me immediately.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A（arrive）。時間副詞子句 as soon as 後面應用現在式表示未來事件，不用未來式。B 選項錯誤，子句中不用 will；C 選項現在完成式不符文脈；D 選項進行式不適合表達確定事件。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選填正確形式，表示老師一進教室就停止講話
mc_exercises.question_eng: The moment the teacher _______ the classroom, all students stop talking.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B（enters）。the moment 後的時間副詞子句應用現在簡單式，主句亦用現在式表習慣性動作。A 選項錯誤，子句不用未來式；C 選項現在完成式不符；D 選項進行式語氣不當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選填正確形式，表示一旦比賽開始就沒有人能改變規則
mc_exercises.question_eng: Once the game _______, no one can change the rules anymore.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C（begins）。once 引導時間副詞子句，應用現在簡單式表示未來事件，主句用 can 表達可能性。A 選項錯誤，子句不用未來式；B 選項進行式不適合；D 選項現在完成式時態不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選填倒裝句正確形式，強調一接到消息就立刻出發
mc_exercises.question_eng: No sooner _______ the news _______ he immediately set off for home.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B（had he received; than）。no sooner...than 倒裝句需用過去完成式 had received + 倒裝語序 had he，主句用過去簡單式。A 選項只用過去式不符倒裝要求；C 選項沒倒裝且用 when 不搭 no sooner；D 選項時態與結構均錯。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我一到家就開始做功課。
translation_exercises.answer: As soon as I get home, I start doing my homework. / The moment I get home, I start doing my homework.
key_points: As soon as / The moment 引導時間副詞子句
子句用現在式 get（不用 will get）
主句用簡單現在式 start
hints: 句型框架：As soon as / The moment + S + V（現在式），S + V（現在式）
常見錯誤：子句誤用 will get home，但時間副詞子句中未來事件仍需用現在式表達

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 一旦老師宣布放假，全班同學就歡呼起來。
translation_exercises.answer: The moment the teacher announces the holiday, the whole class cheers. / Once the teacher announces the holiday, the whole class cheers.
key_points: Once 也可引導時間副詞子句，意同 as soon as
cheers 搭配 the whole class（集合名詞用單數動詞）
子句與主句均用現在式
hints: 句型框架：Once + S + V（現在式），S + V（現在式）
注意：集合名詞 the whole class 視為單數，動詞用第三人稱單數

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 她一看到考試成績就立刻打電話給父母告訴他們好消息。
translation_exercises.answer: As soon as she sees her exam results, she immediately calls her parents to tell them the good news. / The moment she sees her exam results, she immediately calls her parents to tell them the good news.
key_points: sees 現在式表達未來事件
immediately 副詞修飾主句動詞 calls
不定詞片語 to tell them 表目的
hints: 句型框架：As soon as + S + V（現在式），S + adv. + V（現在式）...
易錯點：不要在時間副詞子句中使用 will see，即使表未來事件也要用現在式

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他剛一完成報告，主任就召集他進辦公室討論內容。
translation_exercises.answer: No sooner had he finished the report than the director called him into the office to discuss the content. / Hardly had he finished the report when the director called him into the office to discuss the content.
key_points: No sooner / Hardly 引導倒裝句，語氣比 as soon as 更強
前子句用過去完成式 had finished
than / when 後接過去簡單式 called（非倒裝句）
hints: 倒裝句型框架：No sooner / Hardly + had + S + V（過去分詞）+ than / when + S + V（過去式）
常見錯誤：倒裝時混淆時態，前半段應用 had + 過去分詞，後半段用過去簡單式；且 no sooner...than、hardly...when 搭配不能互換
